product_overview: A highly interactive and visually appealing personal portfolio website showcasing skills, education, projects, and contact information with modern UI animations and responsive design.
core_goals: Provide a clean and lightweight personal portfolio site that loads quickly and performs smoothly.
Showcase the developer's skills, education, and project portfolio with easy navigation and interactive elements.
Enable users to toggle between light and dark themes for better accessibility and personal preference.
Provide convenient access to download CV and portfolio documents.
Ensure responsiveness and accessibility across different devices and screen sizes.
key_features: Home Page featuring hero section, about me, education, skills dock, portfolio showcase, and contact information.
Responsive Navigation Bar with menu items, search functionality, and theme toggle switch.
Portfolio Section with animated project cards supporting filtering by project type (Web/Mobile) and search capabilities.
Dark/Light Theme Switching with smooth animated toggle components.
Modal for downloading CV and Portfolio PDF documents.
Social Media Integration linking to LinkedIn, GitHub, and Instagram profiles.
Animated UI Components including gradient text, shimmer buttons, magic cards, and text animations for an engaging user experience.
Skills Dock with icons displaying programming languages and tools.
Contact Section with phone number, email, and social media buttons for easy communication.
Centralized Site Configuration for navigation and metadata management.
Root Layout with theme providers ensuring consistent styling and global navigation.
Custom Icon Components enhancing visual clarity and UI consistency.
user_flow_summary: User lands on the Home Page and views an engaging hero section introducing the portfolio owner.
User navigates the site using the responsive Navigation Bar, easily accessing different sections like About Me, Education, Skills, Portfolio, and Contact.
User can filter and search projects in the Portfolio Section and interact with animated project cards for detail exploration.
User switches between light and dark modes using the animated theme toggle for personalized viewing.
User triggers the Document Download Modal to download CV and Portfolio files directly.
User follows social media links from various sections to connect with the portfolio owner.
User accesses Contact Section to find various means of communication including phone, email, and social links.
validation_criteria: All major components render correctly and match design specifications on multiple devices and screen sizes.
Navigation Bar responsiveness verified including menu items, search, and theme toggle functionality.
Portfolio filtering and search work accurately and perform efficiently.
Theme toggle changes the site theme instantly with smooth animations and persists user preference.
Document Download Modal opens correctly and initiates file downloads.
Social media links point to correct external profiles and open in new tabs.
Performance metrics meet industry standards for a lightweight, fast-loading portfolio site.
Accessibility standards are met including keyboard navigation and ARIA attributes for interactive elements.
All animations run smoothly without causing UI jank or significant performance degradation.
